Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gokren]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Gokren is absent from the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Gokren is the Truegold and chief of the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Gokren is a member of the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Gokren has a Highgold son.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Gokren's son was an Iron who was killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Gokren has an acid-green Sandviper on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Gokren uses Forged madra from the Path of the Sandviper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Gokren is the Sandviper chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Gokren has gray hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Gokren uses a short spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Gokren's madra is foul and bitter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Gokren is a leader or member of a sect that provides mounts and vehicles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Gokren is a member of the Sandvipers who rides a bat donated by the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Gokren is an associate of Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Gokren is a Sandviper who wields a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Gokren's spear glows green with toxic madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Gokren lost a hand to Lindon's Path.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
